    Cancer Rehabilitation and Recovery Training in Worthing

    Private one-to-one sessions with a Cancer Rehabilitation Specialist and Exercise Referral Specialist (Level 4 qualified). Whether you are in cancer treatment, post-surgery recovery, managing a chronic condition, living with a disability, or have complex medical needs — there is a specialist programme here for you.

    What Sessions Involve
    What to Expect

    This Is Not Like Other Personal Training

    Personal training at Eternal Fitness is not about pushing harder, going faster, or doing more. It is about rehabilitation, recovery, and what your body needs right now — whether managing a health condition, recovering from cancer treatment, or living with a disability — and building a sustainable programme around that. Sessions are private, one-to-one, and held in a small studio in Worthing where there is no gym floor, no other clients watching, and no comparison to anyone else.

    My specialist training in cancer rehabilitation and exercise referral means I am trained to adapt to medical conditions, medication side-effects, fatigue cycles, and variable capacity. I work within your GP's or specialist's guidance. I do not guess — I ask, I listen, and I adjust every session based on your body's actual needs that day.

    Specialist Areas

    Who I Work With

    I specialise in working with people who have been underserved by mainstream fitness. If your situation is not listed here, please still get in touch — the answer is almost always yes.

    Cancer & cancer rehabilitation

    During active treatment, in remission, or post-surgery. I am qualified in cancer rehabilitation and adapt to wherever you are in your journey.

    Chronic health conditions

    Including autoimmune conditions, fibromyalgia, ME/CFS, heart conditions, diabetes, and more. Every session adapts to what your body can manage that day.

    Disability & adaptive training

    Physical disabilities, significant mobility limitations, and sensory impairments including visual impairment. Programmes are built around your body, not a template.

    GP-referred exercise

    I am qualified in exercise referral and experienced in working alongside medical guidance from GPs and healthcare teams.

    Injury recovery & rehabilitation

    Post-surgical, post-fracture, and musculoskeletal conditions. I work within the guidance of your physiotherapist or consultant.

    Neurological conditions

    Including Parkinson's, MS, stroke recovery, and acquired brain injury. Gentle, progressive, and always adapted.

    What I Work On

    Recovery and Rehabilitation for Real Life

    The focus is functional rehabilitation — building strength, mobility, endurance, and capability for real life during and after health conditions. Not aesthetics. Not performance metrics. Real outcomes: returning to activities after cancer treatment, climbing stairs without pain, managing fatigue, walking further, recovering independence, sleeping better, regaining confidence in your own body.

    ✦

    Mobility and joint health

    Improving range of motion, reducing stiffness, and moving with less effort and pain day-to-day.

    ✦

    Functional strength

    Building practical strength for real life — carrying shopping, climbing stairs, getting up from the floor.

    ✦

    Balance and stability

    Reducing fall risk and building the physical confidence to move through your environment safely.

    ✦

    Fatigue management

    Learning how to train effectively when energy levels are variable or unpredictable — a common challenge with many health conditions.

    The Process

    How It Works

    Free Consultation

    A relaxed 30-minute conversation with me about your goals, health history, and what has and has not worked before. No pressure, no commitment.

    Movement Assessment

    I check your current mobility, strength, and any limitations before any programme begins — so training starts safely and clearly.

    Your Programme

    A plan built entirely around your body and your life. Session structure, exercises, and intensity are all tailored specifically to you.

    Ongoing Support

    I adjust your programme as your health and capacity change — keeping training sustainable, realistic, and aligned with where you are.

    Ready to Find Out If This Is Right for You?

    The first conversation is free, there is no commitment, and there is no such thing as the wrong question. I work with a small number of clients at any one time — so every person gets my full attention.

    Give Me a Call
